What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a dark blue long-sleeved garment uses a knife to spread a white creamy substance from a glass jar onto a slice of white bread. A green plate holds folded slices of pink meat and pale cheese nearby. A yellow plastic bottle stands next to the jar, and a single white egg rests inside a white ceramic bowl on the countertop.

question: Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: A hand holds a slice of white bread while another hand uses a silver knife to spread mayonnaise from a jar with a green label. Slices of pink deli meat and cheese are arranged on a green plate to the side. A white bowl containing an egg sits near a yellow squeeze bottle on the surface.

question: Describe the sequence of actions taken to prepare the bread slice.
canonical_answer: At 8s, a knife cuts the top off a yellow plastic bottle; at 10s, a slice of white bread appears on the counter; at 12s, a hand reaches into a glass jar labeled MAY; at 16s, a knife spreads white creamy substance onto the bread slice held in hand.

question: Detail the specific ingredients and containers visible on the workspace during assembly.
canonical_answer: At 8s, a green plate holds sliced pink meat and cheese; at 10s, a white egg is visible inside a white bowl; at 16s, a yellow squeeze bottle sits next to the open jar; at 18s, partial text MAY is visible on the jar label near the bread.
